name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 licenses/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 licenses/month, managing multiple licenses causes legal penalties. We automate the generation and filing of licenses instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Managing multiple business licenses and permits can lead to missed deadlines and legal issues.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Managing multiple business licenses and permits can lead to missed deadlines and legal issues.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 licenses/month, managing multiple licenses causes legal penalties. We automate the generation and filing of licenses instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and filing of licenses and permits

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 licenses/month, managing multiple licenses causes legal penalties. We automate the generation and filing of licenses instead of manual tracking.
